frontmatter_compliance.notes: All required fields present; valid semver; no XML brackets in values; allowed-tools hyphenated; composes_with target sync-skills exists.

description_quality.notes: 1011 chars (under 1024); starts with 'Scan'; 10+ trigger keywords; very pushy.

progressive_disclosure.notes: Body 118 lines; two reference .md files plus a JSON template all linked with when-to-read guidance.

instruction_clarity.notes: Imperative voice; Bootstrap + Consolidation modes clearly separated; six numbered steps each with rationale.

coordination.notes: composes_with sync-skills accurate; owns.patterns settings.local.json no conflicts.

completeness.notes: All references resolve including the autonomous-permissions.json template; edge cases enumerated.

anti_patterns.notes: Description is 1011 chars — only 13 under the 1024 ceiling; risky for future edits. Otherwise clean.

important.item: Description is 1011 chars — 13 chars under the 1024 hard ceiling; future edits risk FAIL
